revision.comment: Changed protection settings for "[[Template:Compare image with Wikidata]]": [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]]: 8,000+ transclusions ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 4 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23176857634|manual triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Compare_image_with_Wikidata here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Compare_image_with_Wikidata for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{#if:{{#property:P18}}
|{{#if:{{{local|}}}
| {{#ifeq: {{filepath:
{{Replace
|{{Replace|{{{local|}}}|File:|}}
|Image:|}}
}}
    | {{filepath:{{#invoke:WikidataIB |getPreferredValue |P18 |name=image |fetchwikidata=ALL |onlysourced=no |noicon=yes | maxvals=1 }}}}
||}}
|}}
}}<noinclude>{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:Articles having same image on Wikidata and Wikipedia]]
[[Category:Articles having different image on Wikidata and Wikipedia]]
[[Category:No local image but image on Wikidata]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
